title: grewia cuneifolia
intro: Grewia cuneifolia, also known as the Cut-leaved Grewia or Cuneate Grewia, is a species of flowering plant in the family Malvaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Grewia cuneifolia include relief from fever, skin conditions, and digestive issues, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. Grewia cuneifolia can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
